title: portfolio-macro-scenario output
description: Canonical structured output for the portfolio-macro-scenario skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered sensitivity table + book P&L with CI + dominant contributors + take) is described in references/rendering.md.

as_of.description: Local as-of date the run was anchored to.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the script ran.

lookback_days.description: Trading days of daily returns used in the regression.

factors.description: The four macro factor ETF tickers in design-matrix column order: TLT (rates), UUP (dollar), USO (oil), GLD (gold).

tlt_duration.description: Assumed TLT effective duration (years) used to convert the rate shock to a TLT return.

rates_bp.description: Parallel rate shock in basis points.

factor_shocks.description: The scenario translated into per-factor ETF return shocks (decimal).

phrase.description: Human-readable one-line description of the non-zero shocks.

n_positions.description: Positions that survived the history filter.

n_excluded.description: Positions excluded for missing price or insufficient history.

book_value_usd.description: Sum of position values (shares * latest close) across surviving positions.

sensitivities.description: Per-position regression betas and scenario P&L.

price.description: Latest close used to value the position.

n_obs.description: Aligned observations used in the regression.

betas.description: OLS beta of the position return to each factor return, keyed by factor ticker.

residual_std.description: Daily residual std of the regression (return units).

factor_contributions_usd.description: P&L attributed to each factor: position_value * beta_factor * factor_shock.

expected_pnl_usd.description: Aggregate expected P&L across surviving positions.

ci_std_usd.description: Book-level P&L std, sqrt of summed squared per-position P&L stds (independence assumed).

dominant_positions.description: Positions ranked by absolute contribution to book P&L.

contribution_pct.description: pnl_usd / book expected P&L. Null when book P&L is ~0.

dominant_factors.description: Factors ranked by aggregate contribution to book P&L.

excluded.description: Positions dropped for missing price or insufficient history.

take.description: One-sentence net-exposure summary of the book under the scenario.

tier_caveats.description: Honest caveats: rate-limit flags, unstable betas, factor collinearity, linear shock approximation, duration assumption, CI simplification.
